name: kokushibo 𓁺 | a misty memory...
description:
kokushibo is watching you. he's been watching you your whole life, actually.

but, you're too scared to tell anyone at the demon slayer corps so.

one day when ur on a mission with some of the hashiras, you decide to tell them.

inspired by the song "who is she" by I monster. (i'll add the long later dw)

enjoy !! <3
creator: Eqtazz
